mainDressCode.title: Attire Guide
mainDressCode.description: Formal or semi-formal. Please wear cream and soft purple (cream, ivory, and lavender count).

sections.title: Principal & Secondary Sponsors
sections.description: Men: Cream Barong, off white Polo, Ivory or pocket square. Women: Any type of dress or top in lavender or soft purple.

sections.title: Guests
sections.shortDescription: Men: Long sleeves, trousers, dress shoes. Women: Any type of dress or top in lavender or soft purple. No denim, t-shirts, sneakers, or dark color outfit.
